label: Full Diagnostic
prompt: Run a full system diagnostic — check GPUs, CPU, memory, storage, and system logs for any errors or issues.

label: GPU Status
prompt: Check GPU health: temperatures, utilization, memory usage, power draw, and any errors.

label: Memory Check
prompt: Check system memory: total RAM, usage, and check for any ECC/memory errors.

label: CPU Status
prompt: Check CPU status: model, core count, temperatures, and utilization.

label: Error Logs
prompt: Check system logs (dmesg, journalctl) for any recent errors, warnings, or hardware failures.

label: Storage
prompt: Check storage health: disk space, SMART data, and any disk errors.

label: IPMI Sensors
prompt: Check IPMI sensor readings if available: temperatures, voltages, fan speeds.

label: Docker Status
prompt: List all Docker containers with their status, resource usage, and any issues.

label: Network Info
prompt: Check network configuration: interfaces, IP addresses, DNS, and test connectivity.

label: Update System
prompt: Check if there are any system package updates available (apt).
